title: PropEquity is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: PropEquity is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
PropEquity, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Property Advisor for our Indore operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About PropEquity:
PropEquity is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PropEquity!
